title: ECB highlights need for EU tokenized deposit regulation to avoid fragmentation
message_html: ECB highlights need for EU tokenized deposit regulation to avoid fragmentation ...
snippet: During a hearing of the European Parliament’s ECON committee yesterday, ECB Executive Board member Piero Cipollone made a forceful case for public sector involvement in wholesale tokenized finance, calling it “extremely important” and warning that without it, the opportunity could be lost. He argued
